home.hero_subtitle: AI-powered finance tracker that helps you spend smarter, budget easier, and keep your money goals on track.

track.title: Track Everything
track.text: Log income and expenses in seconds with smart categories.

analytics.title: Smart Analytics
analytics.text: Beautiful charts and monthly reports keep you informed.

ai.title: AI Financial Advisor
ai.text: Get personalized advice based on your latest spending.

steps.1_desc: Sign up and secure your profile with our modern auth flow.
steps.2_desc: Add income, expenses, and stay on top of every dollar.
steps.3_desc: Get actionable saving tips and predicted balances.

home.design_title: Premium fintech design built for clarity
home.design_desc: Get a streamlined experience that feels polished and responsive across desktop and mobile devices.

auth.login_subtitle: Access your dashboard and stay on top of every transaction.
auth.register_subtitle: Start tracking expenses and get AI-driven insights right away.

auth.terms_error: Please agree to the terms to continue.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your financial snapshot at a glance.
dashboard.summary_ready: Your latest finance summary is ready. Review income, expenses, and upcoming trends at a glance.
dashboard.spending_tip_desc: Your finances are shaping up nicely. Review your top categories and reduce recurring costs where needed.
dashboard.prediction_value: End month with an estimated {{amount}} buffer.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Manage your cash flow
transactions.no_transactions: No transactions found. Add your first transaction to get started.

budget.title: Budget
budget.subtitle: Monthly category goals
budget.description: Keep spending aligned with your priorities and get notified before you hit your caps.
budget.no_budgets: No budgets set. Create your first budget to start tracking.
budget.tip_1: Reduce dining out expenses by 10% to free up more savings.
budget.tip_2: Move subscriptions to a single billing week for easier tracking.
budget.tip_3: Allocate a dedicated travel fund for next quarter.

ai.title: AI Assistant
ai.subtitle: Personal finance advisor
ai.description: Chat with AI-powered finance advice and explore actionable recommendations from your latest summary.
ai.placeholder: Ask about your spending, budget, or savings goals
ai.system_prompt: The user's financial data is injected automatically from their transaction history and budget summaries before each message is sent to AI.
ai.spending_pattern_value: Your biggest expense this month is {{category}} at {{amount}}.
ai.no_expenses: No significant expenses recorded this month yet.
ai.expenses_exceed_income: Your expenses exceed income this month. Consider reviewing non-essential spending.
ai.income_covers_expenses: Great job — your income covers expenses. Consider allocating the surplus to savings or investments.
ai.prediction_desc: Expected monthly net based on current income and expenses.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Financial performance
reports.description: Generate detailed reports to analyze trends, track growth, and identify areas for improvement.
reports.selected_range: Selected range for the current analysis.
reports.sum_income: Sum of all income in the period.

settings.title: Settings
